_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Recent Activity batch link from "archived" event routes to /item/ instead of /batch/

steps.description: Add an entity_type parameter (default None) to orch/archive/batch_archiver.py:_emit, and update every call site within the archiver to pass entity_type="batch" for batch-scoped events. Do NOT change other emitters.

Review S01: every call to _emit in batch_archiver.py supplies entity_type="batch"; signature change is backward-safe (default None); no changes leaked into other modules; daemon_events append-only contract preserved.

In dashboard/templates/pages/project/dashboard.html, harden the Recent Activity fallback (currently lines 115-119): when entity_type is missing, detect entity_id starting with "BATCH-" and route to /batch/; otherwise keep the existing /item/ fallback. Do NOT touch the explicit entity_type branches.
Review S03: prefix detection is correct (case-sensitive "BATCH-"), no other prefixes accidentally matched, autoescape is not bypassed, no changes to the doc_job / work_item / explicit batch branches.

Add tests/integration/test_i00068_batch_link_routing.py with: (a) backend test asserting batch_archiver._emit writes entity_type="batch"; (b) dashboard tests asserting BATCH- IDs route to /batch/ for entity_type values None and "batch"; (c) test asserting non-BATCH IDs (e.g., I-99999) with entity_type=None still route to /item/. Assertions check specific URL substrings.
Review S05: tests are falsifiable on main; specific-value assertions; no shape-only checks; existing test_recent_activity_unknown_entity_type_falls_back_to_item_route is not regressed.

Cross-cutting review across S01 + S03 + S05: archiver fix and template fallback work together end-to-end; the regression tests really exercise the broken paths; no other consumers of daemon_events.entity_type regressed; full unit + integration suite passes.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
QV: Browser verification — confirm a BATCH- link from an archived event navigates to /batch/ and the batch detail page renders without 404
